---
title: "My R Markdown Primer"
author: "Metadata"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: html_document
---
R Markdown is a document format in R Studio that gives space for writing instructions along with seperate code workspaces. This structure provides a visually balanced environment for the user. When the user hits "knit", the document output will list both the markdown text, as well as the coded lines fully processed. $/pi$

### First Execution of MtCars

```{r}
data(mtcars)
print(mtcars)

```

## Second Execution of MtCars 

```{r}
summary(mtcars)
dim(mtcars)
```
